title: Array Technologies (ARRY) Q3 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
text:
Array Technologies Q3 2025 Earnings Summary

Key Financial Metrics:

Revenue & Growth:
- Q3 revenue: $393 million (70% YoY growth, 9% sequential)
- Year-to-date 2025: Over $1 billion (exceeds full-year 2024 of $916 million)
- Volume growth: 74% YoY increase with 56% megawatt delivery growth

Profitability:
- Adjusted gross profit: $111 million (35% YoY growth)
- Adjusted gross margin: 28.1%
- Adjusted EBITDA: $72 million (55% YoY growth, 18.3% margin)
- Adjusted EPS: $0.30 vs. $0.17 prior year

Balance Sheet:
- Cash position: $222 million
- Total liquidity: Over $365 million
- Net debt leverage: 2.1x trailing twelve months EBITDA

Full-Year 2025 Guidance (Raised):
- Revenue: $1.25-$1.28 billion (midpoint up $60M+)
- Adjusted EBITDA: $185-$195 million
- Adjusted EPS: $0.64-$0.70
- Free cash flow: ~$100 million

Major Highlights:

Product Innovation: New offerings (OmniTrak, Skylink, Hail XP) comprise nearly 40% of order book

Order Book Quality: CEO noted greater than 50% of the order book is now not EPCs, indicating shift toward utility and developer customers

APA Integration: Recently acquired solar foundation company contributed $17 million Q3 revenue; co-developed integrated solutions expected in 2026

Supply Chain: Tariff exposure reduced to less than 14% of bill of materials by year-end through domestic sourcing initiatives
